heading: Authority
label: 4331 Authority
text: For the purpose of providing a residential facility for postsecondary technical training and education for individuals who are deaf in order to prepare them for successful employment, the institution of higher education with which the Secretary has an agreement under this part is authorized to operate and maintain a National Technical Institute for the Deaf.
notes: Prior ProvisionsA prior , title I, , , as amended, authorized Gallaudet University to operate Kendall Demonstration Elementary School and was classified to , prior to repeal by .section 111 of Pub.
